title: Port V1 NPC sprites to CommonsV2

log.context: Port V1 NPC sprites to CommonsV2

Both pushed. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

---

**Implementation complete.** Three changes across two repos:

**`/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/sprites.ts`** (new file)
- `SPRITE_SLUG_MAP` copied verbatim from V1 grazing.html — 17 NPC entries mapping server slug → sprite function ID + poll slug
- `fetchSpriteWinners()` polls `/api/vote/sprite-{pollSlug}` for each NPC, runs on load and every 30s
- Exports `getWinner(npcName)` → `"A"|"B"|"C"|null` and `getSpriteId(npcName)` → `string|n...(truncated)
